title: 8. NG   Point  --  Ren 17 (CV 17)
text:
If there was a problem with lung expansion while breathing.
It strengthens the Qi of lungs and opens the chest.
in cases:
 Acute and chronic respiratory problems
 Cough and bronchitis and bronchial asthma
 Dyspnea and hard breathing
 Heaviness and a feeling of fullness in the chest and pain in the chest wall
 Functional heart problems
Caution: The needle should be driven superficially and obliquely downwards.
29 | P a g e
